---
title: "How to use R in Visual Studio Code"
description: "A guide to setting up R in Visual Studio Code"
author: "Luke"
date: "2024-10-2"
categories:
  - programming
  - R
  - vscode
image: "images/" #TODO
comments:
  utterances:
    repo: lukmayer/site_comments
    theme: github-dark
    issue-term: url
draft: true #TODO
---

- Radian
- R extension
- some settings in settings.json
- Quarto (if you use rmd)


Settings to make radian work properly

  "r.rterm.linux": "/home/lm/.local/bin/radian",
  "r.bracketedPaste": true,  


Setting to make plotting work more smoothly

  "r.plot.useHttpgd": true,


change where plots pop up

"r.session.viewers.viewColumn": {
    "plot": "Active",
    "viewer": "Active",
    "view": "Active",
    "helpPanel": "Active"
  },

Change where quarto preview pops up

  "quarto.render.previewType": "external",



Make sure R is "attached"
